title: Phase 12 — Consolidation closure (cross-cutting refactors)
items: 12.A io/ body extraction (markup-only): extra/io/index.ts is now a 98-LOC barrel; canonical bodies live in 30+ per-protocol sub-files (websocket, webhook, http, sse, mcp, otel, syslog, statsd, prometheus, kafka, redis-stream, pulsar, nats, rabbitmq, csv, ndjson, clickhouse-watch, sqlite, prisma, kysely, drizzle, to-{file,csv,clickhouse,mongo,postgres,s3,loki,tempo}, checkpoint, _internal). Landed in commit 0dc5f9e (pre-Phase-12 Tier 2.1 follow-up); markup reconciled in this batch.

12.B Sibling-file physical relocation: 18 top-level files moved into category folders. composite/external-register/stratify/observable/pubsub/backpressure → composition/. reactive-{map,list,log,index} → data-structures/. storage-{core,tiers,tiers-node,tiers-browser} → storage/{core,tiers,tiers-node,tiers-browser} (renamed; storage- prefix dropped). cascading-cache, content-addressed-storage → storage/{cascading-cache,content-addressed}. http-error → io/http-error. backoff → resilience/backoff. Top-level paths preserved as 1-line re-export shims (~50 internal imports unchanged). reactive-sink deferred (no clear sub-folder home).

12.C promptNode B.3 widening (verify-only): exhaustive grep for prompt_node::call / ::call across tests/examples/demos/website/evals returned zero hits. The ::messages / ::output / ::response topology was already in place; Tier 6.6 lock-in test (phase5-llm-composition.test.ts:372) passes.

12.D extends Graph sweep: RefineLoopGraph (patterns/harness/presets/refine-loop.ts) and AgentMemoryGraph (patterns/ai/presets/agent-memory.ts) migrated from Object.assign(graph, ...) to class extends Graph. Tier R5.1 deferral lifted (agent(spec) consumer in Phase 13.G is the trigger). refineLoop / agentMemory factories return new <ClassName>(...). setStrategy / pause / resume on RefineLoopGraph are instance methods reading this.strategy / this._pauseState / this.status / this.iteration. Mirrors MemoryWithKGGraph / MemoryWithTiersGraph precedent. Pre-1.0 surface: types change from interface ... extends Graph / Graph & {...} to real classes — instanceof now narrows correctly; non-breaking widening for in-tree consumers.

Verification: 2646 tests passing (no regressions; same count as Phase 11 baseline since this batch is structural-only); pnpm run build green (assertBrowserSafeBundles honored); pnpm run lint clean on touched files.

title: Phase 12 — /qa pass on the consolidation batch
items: A1 — RefineLoopGraph constructor public field assignments (best/score/status/history/strategy/iteration/generate/evaluate/analyze/decide/_pauseState) moved EARLIER in the constructor, immediately after the messagingHub mount, BEFORE any subscribe(() => undefined) activation. Defensive against sync-strategy drain reaching downstream consumers before fields are bound.

A2 — RefineLoopGraph constructor calls this.tagFactory('refineLoop', placeholderArgs({ seed, evaluator, initialStrategy, ...opts })) after super() for parity with agentMemory. Surfaces factory: 'refineLoop' provenance in describe() / compileSpec round-trip.
A3 — AgentMemoryGraph constructor: extractFn-resolution validation moved BEFORE tagFactory(...) so an invalid-opts throw doesn't leave a tagged-but-empty Graph instance behind.

D1 — RefineLoopGraph.decideEffect resume-stall fix. Eliminated all four cross-node .cache reads in the effect fn body: iterationTrigger.cache replaced by iter riding with new CandidatesEnvelope<T> envelope (canonical §32 envelope; switchMap projector emits {iter, items}; candidatesItemsNode derived sidecar preserves Evaluator<T> API). historyState.cache / budgetState.cache / pauseState.cache replaced by §28 closure mirrors latestHistory / latestBudget / latestPaused, consistent with pre-existing latestStrategy / latestFeedback / latestPrevCandidates mirrors. feedbackEnvelopeNode gated on scoresFired (only emits when user evaluator actually fired this wave) — eliminates spurious decideEffect trigger on candidates-only fan-out waves (the underlying mechanism of the resume-stall: stale-scores with new-iter envelope tag would poison lastDecidedIteration and starve the real next-iter decision). evaluateEventNode / analyzeEventNode / generateEventNode similarly read iter from envelope. Evaluator<T> JSDoc tightened with cancel-on-input contract (async evaluators MUST cancel in-flight work on candidates change).

D1 in-cycle extension (2026-05-01) — audit found 2 additional cross-node .cache reads in pre-existing built-in strategies reachable from reactive fn execution paths: opts.tokens.cache in blindVariation:1259 and errorCritique:1477. Generalized tryIncrementBounded(counter, cap, by = 1) with optional by parameter (backward-compatible — defaults to 1; existing 3 call sites unchanged); both strategies now call tryIncrementBounded(opts.tokens, Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER, iterCost). Strategy bodies are now P3-clean.

D1 read-pattern refinement (2026-05-01) — second-pass cleanup of the closure-mirror form. User-locked principle: sole-owner-and-reactive-reader nodes in the same enclosing constructor scope are a sanctioned .cache read form; closure mirrors duplicate state with no functional benefit. Reverted latestHistory / latestBudget back to historyState.cache / budgetState.cache reads inside decideEffect.fn (decideEffect is sole writer + sole reactive reader). pauseState (written by pause()/resume() imperative methods) promoted to a direct declared dep of decideEffect — feedbackFired gate serves double duty (skips fn body when only pauseState fires). Net: −3 closure variables, −3 subscribe handlers (~15 LOC); +1 declared edge decideEffect ← pauseState visible in describe() / explain().

Verification: 2646 tests passing; pnpm run build green; pnpm run lint clean. All cross-node .cache reads in reactive fn bodies are now either eliminated, replaced with tryIncrementBounded, replaced with envelope/dep, or sanctioned per the sole-owner pattern.

Deferred follow-ups filed in optimizations.md 'QA follow-ups from Phase 12 /qa pass': D1 follow-up (wrapEvaluator() helper for cancel-on-input enforcement); B2 (tiers-branch path divergence — pre-existing, doc-only); B3 (intra-extra/ imports route through legacy top-level shims); B4 (tsup.config.ts nodeOnlyEntries allow-list comment); B5a–g (smaller items: addDisposer mid-constructor doc, opts mutation freeze, KG mount asymmetry, field-name collision forward-compat, expose tiersGraph, node import shadowing, sources/{git,fs}.ts barrel comment).
